ab: hicaen isu tayda i dabek?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: pakadideng kaku tayda i dabek.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: hicaen nida tayda/tayza i padekuan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: culil han nida tayda i padekuan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: hicaen isu tayda i Pung-hu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: makahikuki kaku tayda i Pung-hu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: hicaen isu tayda i Pung-hu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: makabalunga’ kaku tayda i Pung-hu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: u canan ku kacawan isu taluma’?
en: How do you go home?

ab: makanulpin kaku taluma’.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: u canan ku kacawan ni Panay tayda i cacudadan?
en: How does Panay go to school?

ab: makasilamalay ci Panay tayda i cacudadan.
en: Panay goes to school by train.

ab: u canan ku kacawan ni Tubah tayda i kiwkay?
en: How does Tubah go to church?

ab: makabatikal ci Tubah tayda i kiwkay.
en: Tubah goes to church by bicycle.

ab: makanulpin kisu tayda i cacudadan haw?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: caay, makabasu kaku tayda i cacudadan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: makabatikal kisu tayda i cacudadan haw?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: hang, makabatikal kaku tayda i cacudadan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: makasiumalay kisu tayza i Takaw haw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: hang, makasiumalay kaku tayda i Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: tayda i Pusung kisu makasilamalay u makahikuki?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: makahikuki kaku, makahikuki ku dadawaay tu makasilamalay.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: tayda i kiwkay kisu makabasu u paculil tu kadideng?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: paculil tu kazizeng kaku tayza i kiwkay, paculil tu kazizeng ku caluwayay tu makabasuay.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: u cacakayan micapi’ tu luma’ namu haw?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: caay kacapi’, makautubay kaku tayda/tayza i cacakayan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: macapi’ ku payubinan tu cacudadan haw?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: macapi’, culil han katukuh tu.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: macapi’ ku kakacawan tu pikanan haw?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: tahkal i pikacawan culil han lima a sasulitan katukuh tu.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
